name: Apricot & Lemon Lip Balm
recipeIngredient: Few drops essential oil of Lemon or orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the beeswax.
2. Add the apricot and calendula oils, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat while continuing to stir until partly cooled.
4. Add the essential oils of lemon or orange.
5. Store in a small glass pot.
